Notes: * NJCU leads all-time series, 7-1 (results from 1975 and 1976 unknown)
* Officials ended game with 26.1 seconds remaining after bench-clearing brawl;
every player from both teams was disqualified except York #24 Cadogan
Game.Location: Jersey City, NJ (John J. Moore AFC)
Game.Officials: Fran Forenza,  Richard DePena,  Ieasia Walker
